productName: Stock Buddy Financial Analysis Platform - Unified System
executiveSummary: A comprehensive financial-grade stock analysis platform that provides pure, reusable analysis skills via MCP protocol. The system enables clients to provide their own market data for analysis, automatically stores all results in a database with complete audit trail, and provides a professional analytics dashboard for visualization and insights. Built with financial accuracy, regulatory compliance, and risk management as core principles.
problemStatement: Financial institutions, traders, and analysts need a professional-grade stock analysis system that: (1) Works with their existing data sources without vendor lock-in, (2) Provides accurate, auditable analysis suitable for real money decisions, (3) Maintains complete history for compliance and pattern analysis, (4) Offers transparent calculations with proper risk warnings, and (5) Scales to handle institutional volumes while maintaining precision.
targetUsers: Institutional traders making real money decisions
Risk managers monitoring exposure and limits
Quantitative analysts with custom data pipelines
MCP client developers building financial applications
objectives: Provide 14 pure, financial-grade analysis skills via MCP protocol
Enable clients to use any data source while maintaining analysis quality
Ensure 6+ decimal precision with complete calculation transparency
Store all analyses with immutable audit trail for compliance
Display comprehensive risk warnings and mandatory disclaimers
Deliver professional web dashboard with real-time updates
Support institutional scale with sub-second response times
Maintain regulatory compliance with proper documentation
Enable backtesting and scenario analysis with clear boundaries
Provide position sizing and risk management calculations
inScope: 14 financial-grade analysis skills (technical, fundamental, momentum, risk)
Client data provider interface with validation
High-precision calculation engine with audit trail
REST API and WebSocket for real-time updates
Risk assessment and position sizing module
Data quality validation and anomaly detection
outOfScope: Direct broker integration for order placement
constraints: ALL OUTPUTS MUST INCLUDE 'NOT FINANCIAL ADVICE' DISCLAIMER
Must maintain 6+ decimal precision in all calculations
Cannot store client credentials or API keys
Must follow Anthropic Agent Skills specification
Skills must be pure, stateless, and deterministic
Analysis must be reproducible from audit trail
Must comply with financial regulations (MiFID II where applicable)
Risk warnings must be prominent and clear
Calculations must be fully transparent and explainable
Data quality must be validated before processing
Response time must be under 5 seconds for full analysis
Audit logs must be immutable and timestamped
Must support point-in-time reproduction of analyses

requirements.title: Financial-Grade Analysis Skills
requirements.description: Implement 14 specialized analysis skills with financial-grade accuracy, including technical analysis with 6+ decimal precision, fundamental analysis with proper ratios, momentum screening with risk-adjusted metrics, value investment checklists, smart money flow tracking, sentiment analysis, macro regime assessment, signal synthesis, risk management, pattern recognition, market screening, backtesting, portfolio analysis, and position sizing. All skills must include confidence scores, uncertainty bounds, and calculation transparency.
requirements.rationale: Core analytical capability for financial decision-making

requirements.title: Client Data Provider Interface
requirements.description: Enable MCP clients to provide their own market data (OHLCV, fundamentals, news, shareholding, macro) directly in tool calls, with comprehensive validation, type checking, range verification, and data quality scoring. Support both real-time and historical data with proper timestamping and market hours awareness.
requirements.rationale: Enables client data sovereignty and flexibility

requirements.title: High-Precision Calculation Engine
requirements.description: Implement calculation engine maintaining minimum 6 decimal places precision with IEEE 754 compliance, proper rounding rules, compound error prevention, edge case handling, and full audit trail of all calculation steps. Every calculation must be traceable, reproducible, and explainable with intermediate values logged.
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions require precise, auditable calculations

requirements.title: Mandatory Risk Disclaimers
requirements.description: Display prominent, legally-compliant disclaimers on ALL outputs including 'NOT FINANCIAL ADVICE', 'PAST PERFORMANCE DOES NOT GUARANTEE FUTURE RESULTS', 'ALL INVESTMENTS CARRY RISK OF LOSS', 'CONSULT LICENSED FINANCIAL ADVISOR', and 'EDUCATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY'. Disclaimers must be unmissable and repeated in summaries.
requirements.rationale: Legal requirement to prevent liability and protect users

requirements.title: Analysis Result Storage
requirements.description: Store all analysis requests and results in PostgreSQL with immutable audit trail including client ID, timestamp, input data, calculations performed, results generated, confidence scores, data quality metrics, and model versions used. Support efficient querying of historical analyses with complex filters.
requirements.rationale: Required for compliance, audit, and pattern analysis

requirements.title: Professional Analytics Dashboard
requirements.description: Create React/Next.js dashboard displaying analysis history, trends, risk metrics, portfolio overview, and compliance reports. Include interactive charts, real-time updates via WebSocket, advanced filtering, comparison tools, and customizable layouts. Dashboard must load in under 2 seconds with millions of records.
requirements.rationale: Visual analysis and monitoring of financial decisions

requirements.title: Risk Assessment and Position Sizing
requirements.description: Calculate Value at Risk (VaR), implement Kelly Criterion for optimal position sizing, generate stop-loss recommendations based on ATR, enforce maximum exposure limits, assess portfolio risk, and provide Monte Carlo simulations for risk scenarios. Include confidence intervals and worst-case analysis.
requirements.rationale: Prevent catastrophic losses through proper risk management

requirements.title: Data Quality Validation
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive data quality checks including outlier detection using statistical methods, missing data handling with clear warnings, stale data identification based on market hours, anomaly detection using historical patterns, and data completeness scoring. Reject or warn on low-quality data.
requirements.rationale: Bad data leads to bad financial decisions

requirements.title: Confidence Scoring System
requirements.description: Provide confidence scores (0-100%) for every analysis component based on data quality, calculation certainty, market conditions, and model limitations. Include detailed explanation of factors affecting confidence, uncertainty bounds, and recommendations when confidence is low.
requirements.rationale: Users must understand reliability of analysis for decisions

requirements.title: Backtesting Framework
requirements.description: Support historical backtesting with clear separation between historical facts and forward projections. Handle survivorship bias, include transaction costs, provide performance metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, max drawdown), and display confidence bands. Clearly label all assumptions and limitations.
requirements.rationale: Validate strategies before risking real money

requirements.title: Regulatory Compliance Logging
requirements.description: Maintain immutable, timestamped audit logs of all analyses, data sources, calculations, decisions, and user actions for regulatory review. Support compliance reporting for MiFID II, best execution, and suitability requirements. Retain logs per regulatory requirements with automated archival.
requirements.rationale: Meet regulatory requirements for financial services

requirements.title: Model Version Control
requirements.description: Maintain complete version history of all analysis models, formulas, algorithms, and configurations. Enable point-in-time reproduction of any historical analysis using the exact model version that was used. Track model changes with approval workflow and rollback capability.
requirements.rationale: Ensure consistency and enable investigation of past decisions

requirements.title: Stress Testing Framework
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive stress testing for extreme market conditions including black swan events, correlation breakdowns, liquidity crises, and systemic shocks. Provide clear warnings about model limitations, assumptions breaking down, and tail risks. Include historical crisis scenarios.
requirements.rationale: Understand behavior in extreme conditions before they occur

requirements.title: Data Lineage Tracking
requirements.description: Track complete data lineage from source through all transformations to final analysis. Record data provider, fetch timestamp, transformations applied, validation results, and quality scores. Enable full traceability of how each result was derived for audit and debugging.
requirements.rationale: Required for audit trail and debugging analysis issues

requirements.title: Multi-Client Isolation
requirements.description: Support multiple clients with complete data isolation using row-level security. Each client sees only their own analyses, configurations, and reports. Implement client-specific rate limiting, usage tracking, and billing metrics. Ensure no data leakage between clients.
requirements.rationale: Essential for SaaS deployment and data privacy

requirements.title: REST API and WebSocket
requirements.description: Provide comprehensive REST API for programmatic access to analyses, reports, and configurations. Implement WebSocket connections for real-time updates of new analyses, risk alerts, and market events. Include OpenAPI documentation and client SDKs.
requirements.rationale: Enable integration with existing systems and tools

requirements.title: Export and Reporting
requirements.description: Enable export of analyses and reports in CSV, JSON, Excel, and PDF formats. Include charts, tables, and summaries in exports. Support scheduled report generation and automated distribution. Maintain export audit trail for compliance.
requirements.rationale: Required for external reporting and documentation

requirements.title: Performance Optimization
requirements.description: Optimize system to handle 10M+ analysis records with sub-second query response. Implement caching strategies, database indexing, query optimization, and CDN for static assets. Support 1000+ concurrent users with horizontal scaling.
requirements.rationale: Required for institutional scale operations

requirements.title: Market Hours Awareness
requirements.description: Implement market hours checks for DSE (Sunday-Thursday, 10:30 AM - 2:30 PM BST). Label pre/post-market data clearly, warn when using stale data, and adjust analysis based on market session. Include holiday calendar and trading halts awareness.
requirements.rationale: Market timing affects data relevance and decisions

requirements.title: Error Bounds and Uncertainty
requirements.description: Calculate and display error bounds, standard deviations, confidence intervals, and uncertainty ranges for all statistical calculations and projections. Use Monte Carlo simulation for complex uncertainties. Clearly communicate limitations of analysis.
requirements.rationale: Financial decisions must account for uncertainty

requirements.title: Conflict of Interest Disclosure
requirements.description: Require disclosure of any conflicts of interest, data source biases, commercial relationships, or incentives that might affect analysis objectivity. Display prominently when conflicts exist. Maintain transparency about analysis limitations and potential biases.
requirements.rationale: Transparency essential for trust and compliance

requirements.title: Calculation Transparency
requirements.description: Provide complete calculation breakdown showing formulas used, input values, intermediate steps, and final results. Enable step-by-step verification of all calculations. Include references to academic papers or industry standards for formulas used.
requirements.rationale: Users must be able to verify and understand calculations

requirements.title: Data Retention Policies
requirements.description: Implement configurable data retention policies compliant with financial regulations. Automatically archive old analyses to cold storage after configurable period. Support legal holds for litigation. Provide secure deletion with audit trail.
requirements.rationale: Balance storage costs with compliance requirements

requirements.title: Scenario Analysis
requirements.description: Support what-if scenarios with multiple parameter sets, sensitivity analysis showing impact of variable changes, and scenario comparison tools. Include pre-defined scenarios for common market conditions and ability to save custom scenarios.
requirements.rationale: Understand impact of different assumptions on outcomes

requirements.title: Security Implementation
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive security including encryption at rest and in transit, API authentication via JWT/API keys, rate limiting per client, input sanitization to prevent injection, and regular security audits. Follow OWASP guidelines for financial applications.
requirements.rationale: Protect sensitive financial data and prevent attacks

glossary.definition: A stateless, deterministic analysis function that accepts input data and returns consistent results without side effects, following Anthropic Agent Skills specification
Meeting the accuracy, auditability, and compliance standards required for systems making real money decisions
A percentage (0-100%) indicating the reliability of an analysis based on data quality, market conditions, and model limitations
Complete tracking of data from source through all transformations to final result, enabling full traceability
Calculation of optimal trade size based on account value, risk tolerance, and Kelly Criterion
Statistical measure of potential loss in value of a portfolio over a defined period for a given confidence interval
Immutable, timestamped record of all system actions, calculations, and decisions for regulatory compliance
Architecture ensuring complete data separation between different clients using the same system

successCriteria: All financial calculations accurate to 6+ decimal places
Audit trail enables complete reproduction of any analysis
System handles 10M+ records with <1s query response
Confidence scores provided for all analyses

risks.description: Calculation errors leading to financial losses
risks.mitigation: Extensive testing, validation, and precision requirements
Comprehensive audit trail and compliance engine

risks.description: Data quality issues causing incorrect analysis
System used for unauthorized financial advice

changes: Unified PRD combining client data, storage, and financial requirements
Comprehensive financial-grade requirements for real money decisions
Complete system specification for production deployment
